ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spells" (
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spell */,
  "spell_name" TEXT /* Name of the spell */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the spell's effect */,
  "base_damage" INTEGER /* Base damage dealt by the spell */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Cost in mana to cast the spell */,
  "area_of_effect" TEXT /* Area over which the spell is effective */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the spell's effect */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of element the spell belongs to */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target the spell affects */,
  "level_required" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to learn the spell */,
  "skill_points_required" INTEGER /* Skill points required to learn the spell */,
  "is_learnable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the spell can be learned by players */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL or path to the spell's icon image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_mastery" (
  "mastery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mastery level record */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spell being mastered */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of mastery achieved */,
  "additional_damage" INTEGER /* Additional damage per level of mastery */,
  "xp_bonus" INTEGER /* Experience points bonus per level */,
  "heal_points" INTEGER /* Healing points provided per level if applicable */,
  "mana_cost_reduction" INTEGER /* Reduction in mana cost per level of mastery */,
  "cooldown_reduction" INTEGER /* Reduction in cooldown duration per level of mastery */,
  "effect_multipliers" TEXT /* JSON object containing multipliers for different effects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mastery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_mastery_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the player (e.g., Mage, Warrior) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "mana" INTEGER /* Current mana available for casting spells */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Amount of gold the player has */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Current health points of the player */,
  "max_health_points" INTEGER /* Maximum health points of the player */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the player logged into the game */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total time the player has spent in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spell cast event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player casting the spell */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spell being cast */,
  "cast_time" TEXT /* Time the spell was cast */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the spell cast (e.g., Success, Miss, Critical) */,
  "mana_used" INTEGER /* Amount of mana used to cast the spell */,
  "xp_gained" INTEGER /* Experience points gained from casting the spell */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target of the spell (if applicable) */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., Player, Enemy, Area) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_casts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_casts_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "max_mana" INTEGER /* Maximum mana a player of this class can have */,
  "starting_spells" TEXT /* JSON array of spell IDs that the class starts with */,
  "class_abilities" TEXT /* JSON array of special abilities unique to the class */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL or path to the class's icon image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spell effect */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spell associated with this effect */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., Damage, Healing, Buff) */,
  "effect_value" INTEGER /* Value of the effect (e.g., amount healed or damage dealt) */,
  "effect_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the effect in seconds */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_effects_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_cooldowns" (
  "cooldown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cooldown record */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spell that has a cooldown */,
  "cooldown_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the cooldown in seconds */,
  "cooldown_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the cooldown started */,
  "is_global_cooldown" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the cooldown applies globally */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cooldown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_cooldowns_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spell associated with this note */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note or comment */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., Developer, Player, Tutorial) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_notes_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)
